name: uzora-channel
description: Claude-Code channel-shim for uZora: subscribes to GET /stream and re-emits each event as a notifications/claude/channel notification over stdio MCP.

scripts.build:
esbuild uzora-channel.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/uzora-channel.js --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node
import{createRequire as __cr}from'node:module';const require=__cr(import.meta.url);" && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'module'})+'\n')"
